checks.label: Boot < 500ms
checks.description: Server cold-starts and responds to the first health-check request within 500 milliseconds

checks.label: Session Close
checks.description: Properly handles session termination by cleaning up resources and acknowledging the close request

checks.label: Session Resume
checks.description: Can resume a previously started session and restore its state without losing context

checks.label: Stdio Transport
checks.description: Communicates over standard input and output streams using newline-delimited JSON-RPC messages

checks.label: HTTP Transport
checks.description: Communicates over HTTP connections using streamable request and response message pairs

checks.label: Init Handshake
checks.description: Completes the initialization handshake by exchanging version and capability information with the client

checks.label: Init Capabilities
checks.description: Reports the full set of supported capabilities during the initialization handshake response

checks.label: Protocol Version
checks.description: Negotiates the protocol version correctly and falls back gracefully when versions differ

checks.label: Tool List
checks.description: Returns the complete list of available tools with their names, descriptions, and input schemas

checks.label: Tool Call
checks.description: Executes a basic tool call with valid parameters and returns well-structured result content

checks.label: Tool Streaming
checks.description: Streams tool call results incrementally so the client can display partial progress in real time

checks.label: Tool Error Handling
checks.description: Returns structured and descriptive error objects when a tool call fails or receives invalid input

checks.label: Tool Cancellation
checks.description: Cancels an in-progress tool call promptly and releases any resources it was holding

checks.label: Tool Progress
checks.description: Reports incremental progress notifications during long-running tool calls so clients can show status

checks.label: Resource List
checks.description: Returns the complete list of available resources including their URIs, names, and MIME types

checks.label: Resource Read
checks.description: Reads and returns the full content of a resource identified by its unique URI

checks.label: Resource Subscribe
checks.description: Subscribes to resource change notifications and emits update events when content is modified

checks.label: Resource Templates
checks.description: Supports parameterized resource URI templates that clients can fill in with dynamic values

checks.label: Prompt List
checks.description: Returns the complete list of available prompts with their names, descriptions, and argument definitions

checks.label: Prompt Get
checks.description: Retrieves a specific prompt by name and returns its rendered messages ready for the model

checks.label: Prompt Arguments
checks.description: Handles prompt arguments correctly by validating required fields and applying them to the template

checks.label: Logging
checks.description: Sends structured log messages to the client with timestamps, levels, and contextual metadata

checks.label: Log Levels
checks.description: Supports filtering log output by severity levels such as debug, info, warning, and error

checks.label: Sampling
checks.description: Requests LLM completions from the client by sending a sampling request with model preferences
